# Cコード生成

```ruby
puts "hello, world"
```

上記のRubyコードから、下記のようなCのコードが生成される


```c
/* Generated by Spinel AOT compiler */
#include "sp_runtime.h"
static const char *sp_dyn_syms[SP_DYN_SYMS_MAX]; static int sp_ndyn = 0;
static const char *sp_sym_to_s(sp_sym id){if(id>=0&&id<0)return "";if(id>=0&&id<0+sp_ndyn)return sp_dyn_syms[id-0];return "";}
static sp_sym sp_sym_intern(const char *s){for(int i=0;i<0;i++)if(strcmp("",s)==0)return (sp_sym)i;for(int i=0;i<sp_ndyn;i++)if(strcmp(sp_dyn_syms[i],s)==0)return (sp_sym)(0+i);if(sp_ndyn<SP_DYN_SYMS_MAX){sp_dyn_syms[sp_ndyn]=sp_str_dup_external(s);return (sp_sym)(0+sp_ndyn++);}return (sp_sym)0;}

static const char *sp_class_to_s(sp_Class c){switch(c.cls_id){case -100:return SPL("Integer");case -101:return SPL("Float");case -102:return SPL("String");case -103:return SPL("Symbol");case -104:return SPL("Array");case -105:return SPL("Hash");case -106:return SPL("Range");case -107:return SPL("Time");case -108:return SPL("Module");case -109:return SPL("Class");case -110:return SPL("NilClass");case -111:return SPL("TrueClass");case -112:return SPL("FalseClass");case -113:return SPL("Numeric");case -114:return SPL("Comparable");case -115:return SPL("Enumerable");case -116:return SPL("Object");case -117:return SPL("BasicObject");case -118:return SPL("Proc");case -119:return SPL("Kernel");case -120:return SPL("IO");case -121:return SPL("File");case -122:return SPL("Exception");case -123:return SPL("StandardError");case -124:return SPL("RuntimeError");case -125:return SPL("TypeError");case -126:return SPL("ArgumentError");case -127:return SPL("NameError");case -128:return SPL("NoMethodError");case -129:return SPL("StopIteration");case -130:return SPL("Math");case -131:return SPL("Complex");default:return "";} }

int main(int argc,char**argv){
    SP_GC_SAVE();
    sp_program_name = argc > 0 ? argv[0] : "";

#line 1 "hello.rb"
  { const char *_ps = (const char *)((&("\xff" "hello, world")[1])); if (_ps) fputs(_ps, stdout); if (!_ps || !*_ps || _ps[strlen(_ps)-1] != '\n') putchar('\n'); }
  return 0;
}

```
